title: Prisoner Locator Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Prisoner Locator Services 24 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness BAKER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors.
